components.name: Accordion
components.summary: A disclosure stack for FAQs, settings groups, and statement breakdowns.

components.name: Avatar
components.summary: A circular person avatar (account holder, shared-ledger member) with an initials fallback when the image is missing.

components.name: Badge
components.summary: Small pill for status, category, and counts — `default` is oxblood brand fill, `secondary` the neutral workhorse.

components.name: Button
components.summary: Cashflow's action button — solid oxblood `primary` for the main CTA, neutral variants for the rest, tinted `destructive` for deletes.

components.name: Card
components.summary: The default raised surface — white card, hairline border, light shadow, rounded-lg. Everything sits in one.

components.name: Icon
components.summary: Stroke glyph from the built-in registry — lucide-style, renders in `currentColor`, sized by the `size` prop.

props.name: title
props.description:
Accessible label. When set, the icon is exposed to assistive tech as an
image with this name; when omitted, the icon is `aria-hidden` (decorative).

components.name: Kbd
components.summary: A keycap for documenting shortcuts in menus, tooltips, and command hints.

components.name: Link
components.summary: An inline anchor for body copy and table cells. Defaults to the oxblood-leaning `--text-link`; underline appears on hover only.

components.name: Progress
components.summary: A determinate bar for budgets, savings goals, and import progress. Use `tone` to signal state (e.g. `danger` when a category is over budget).

components.name: Separator
components.summary: A hairline rule to separate sections, list rows, or inline metadata.

components.name: Spinner
components.summary: An indeterminate loading ring for buttons, inline fetches, and empty panels. Inside a Button it inherits the label color via `tone="current"`.

components.name: Text
components.summary: The single typography primitive — use it for every piece of text instead of bare tags so the type scale and token colors stay consistent. `variant` sets the scale step and a default tag; `as` overrides the tag.

components.name: LetterAvatar
components.summary: LetterAvatar component

components.name: StatCard
components.summary: StatCard component

components.name: Table
components.summary: Table component

components.name: Tabs
components.summary: Tabs component

components.name: Alert
components.summary: Alert component

components.name: EmptyState
components.summary: EmptyState component

components.name: Skeleton
components.summary: Skeleton component

components.name: AccountCard
components.summary: A tile for a connected account in lists and the accounts grid.

components.name: AmountText
components.summary: The money-value primitive — use it for every currency figure instead of hand-coloring spans, so the green-in / oxblood-out convention stays consistent.

components.name: BudgetMeter
components.summary: A budget-vs-spend row for the budgets screen and category drill-downs. The bar self-colors: green under budget, amber near the limit, oxblood over.

components.name: CategoryBreakdown
components.summary: A card that ranks money by category as horizontal bars — the "net spend by category" tile.

components.name: CategoryPill
components.summary: The category chip for transaction rows, filters, and budgets — icon + label with a per-category tint, drawn from a built-in icon set.

components.name: ImportDropzone
components.summary: The statement-import target for the import flow — drag-and-drop or click-to-browse a CSV/OFX file.

props.name: hint
props.defaultValue: CSV, OFX or QFX · up to 10MB

components.name: MoneyInput
components.summary: A currency amount field for adding/editing transactions and setting budgets. Pass `direction` + `onDirectionChange` to show the in/out toggle.

props.name: onValueChange
props.type: ((value: number | null, raw: string) => void) | undefined

components.name: PeriodSelector
components.summary: The date-range control every ledger view needs — preset periods with an optional custom range, in a compact popover.

props.name: custom
props.type: { from?: string | undefined; to?: string | undefined; } | undefined

props.name: onCustomChange
props.type: ((range: { from?: string | undefined; to?: string | undefined; }) => void) | undefined

props.name: presets
props.defaultValue:
[
  { value: 'this-month', label: 'This month' },
  { value: 'last-30', label: 'Last 30 days' },
  { value: 'this-quarter', label: 'This quarter' },
  { value: 'ytd', label: 'Year to date' },
  { value: 'this-year', label: 'This year' },
  { value: 'custom', label: 'Custom range' },
]

components.name: Sparkline
components.summary: A tiny trend line to sit beside a balance or inside a StatCard — green when the series rises, oxblood when it falls.

components.name: Checkbox
components.summary: A square checkbox for multi-select and form opt-ins (select transactions, terms). Use `indeterminate` on a header checkbox when some but not all rows are selected.

components.name: Combobox
components.summary: A searchable single-select for long option lists (assign a category, pick a payee, choose an account). For a handful of fixed options use NativeSelect.

components.name: Input
components.summary: Input component

components.name: Label
components.summary: Label component

components.name: NativeSelect
components.summary: NativeSelect component

components.name: RadioGroup
components.summary: A single-choice radio group for mutually-exclusive options (account type, statement period). Exported as `RadioGroup`.

components.name: Slider
components.summary: A single-value range control for budgets, thresholds, and filters (e.g. "alert when a transaction exceeds $X").

components.name: Stepper
components.summary: A compact numeric input for small bounded quantities (split count, reminder days, statement months back).

components.name: Switch
components.summary: A pill toggle for on/off settings (notifications, auto-reconcile) — oxblood when on. Use over Checkbox for instant-apply settings, not form submission.

components.name: Textarea
components.summary: Textarea component

components.name: ToggleGroup
components.summary: A segmented control for switching between a few mutually-exclusive views (timeframe, chart type, account filter). For navigation between content panels prefer Tabs; use this for filters and settings.

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.summary: A path trail for nested views (Accounts › Amex Cobalt › Statements).

components.name: Pagination
components.summary: Page navigation for long transaction lists and search results.

components.name: Dialog
components.summary: A modal for confirmations and short forms (delete transaction, edit category, add account). Keep the footer to one primary + one secondary Button.

components.name: DropdownMenu
components.summary: A row/overflow action menu (the ⋯ on a transaction, account, or report). Use `danger` for delete and a `separator` to group destructive actions.

components.name: Toast
components.summary: A transient confirmation that floats bottom-right (transaction saved, statement imported, sync failed). Auto-dismiss after a few seconds; keep copy to one line.

components.name: Tooltip
components.summary: A small hover/focus hint for icon buttons and truncated values (full merchant name, exact timestamp). Keep content to a few words — never essential-only info.
